hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,subprocess,os; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or data.get('file_path',''); r=subprocess.run(['python','-m','black',path],capture_output=True,text=True) if path.endswith('.py') and os.path.exists(path) else None; print(f'black: {path}',file=sys.stderr) if r and r.returncode==0 else (print(f'black error: {r.stderr}',file=sys.stderr) if r else None)"

python -c "import json,sys,re; data=json.load(sys.stdin); tool=data.get('tool_name',''); ti=data.get('tool_input',{}); cmd=ti.get('command',''); path=ti.get('file_path',''); blocked=(tool=='Bash' and bool(re.search(r'(rm|unlink|shred)[^|&;]*\.(db|env)\b',cmd))) or (tool in ('Write','Edit','MultiEdit') and bool(re.search(r'\.(db|env)(\.|$)',path))); print('BLOCKED: .db and .env files cannot be deleted or modified.',file=sys.stderr) if blocked else None; sys.exit(2 if blocked else 0)"
